mapper.prompt:
Create a clean, modern infographic in portrait format.

Title at top, centered in font size 12, navy blue color
Text: Application for {{10.`6`}}

Layout
Vertical timeline aligned left
Four circular blue icons connected by a thin vertical line
Each step has icon on left and text block on right

Color
Primary blue and white only
Soft light grey background
Dark blue headings
Dark grey body text

Typography
Sans serif
Bold for headings
Regular for content
High readability

Spacing
Consistent vertical spacing between steps
Left alignment for all text blocks
Plenty of white space
No borders or clutter

Sections

Step 1
Heading: Role Fit
Content:{{10.`16`}}

Icon: checklist or task icon inside blue circle

Step 2
Heading: Experience
Content:{{10.`17`}}


Icon: person with badge or experience icon inside blue circle

Step 3
Heading: Value
Content:{{10.`18`}}


Icon: growth or dollar arrow icon inside blue circle

Step 4
Heading: Action
Content:{{10.`19`}}


Icon: document icon inside blue circle

Footer
Centered at bottom
Text: Shwetha K M
shwetusandu23@gmail.com

Design rules
Flat design
No shadows
No gradients
Consistent icon style
No extra decorations
Professional LinkedIn style

Output
Single high resolution image
Portrait orientation
